name: John Frume
notes_raw: Lime & coconut water, guava, tropical fruits, tropical flower accord Vanuatu pepper, vetiver, exotic woods.
description: With a main note of Vanuatu Pepper sourced from the island of Vanuatu, this unique tropical perfume transports you to the beautiful and remote Melanesian Islands. Fresh lime and coconut-water mix with the scent of tropical fruits. The fragrance of mischief flower, jasmine and ylang ylang float on the trade winds. Exotic woods and vetiver bring you down to earth while Vanuatu pepper weaves its magic throughout.

name: Love for 3 Oranges
notes_raw: Juicy orange accord created from multiple citrus notes. Creamy orange blossom accord. Bright green notes, woody accord, and musk.
description: Love for 3 Oranges: Flower, Fruit & Tree opens with a juicy orange accord created from multiple citrus notes, and then segues into the fresh, creamy scent of orange blossoms. Bright green notes and woody accords ground our orange tree, providing a solid branch to land on. It’s like sunshine in a bottle.

name: Reflection
notes_raw: Sage, ozone, rain, yucca blossom accord, cactus flower accord, sage blossom accord, Texas cedar, Mesquite wood accord.
description: Reflection opens with the scent of sage and the ozone of the approaching storm. As the rain falls, subtle florals begin to emerge, the desert plants expressing their gratitude by flowering. A mélange of cactus flowers, sage and yucca blooms. A hint of rain-washed cedar and mesquite floats on the air. For a moment you experience a profound contradiction: it is dry and it is wet, it is barren and it is blooming. It is water on the desert.

name: Saffron
notes_raw: Pink peppercorn, turmeric, saffron, peach accord, cananga, jasmine absolute, vanilla, hazelnut, vintage amber accord, tobacco and suede accord, and more saffron!
description: A beautiful, leather-gourmand that leans a little bit vintage and oriental, Saffron starts off with a big dose of Saffron Absolute. This is topped by Pink Peppercorn and a natural Peach Accord before moving into Cananga and Jasmine Absolute. A vintage Amber Accord is further enhanced with Turmeric, Hazelnut, and Vanilla before giving way to soft, sueded, leather with a hint of Tobacco Absolute. Saffrόn will enfold you in a comforting embrace that feels as good as your favorite leather jacket infused with hugs from your favorite person. A perfect, unisex scent for lovers of Leather, Gourmand, and Amber notes.

name: Geisha Violet
notes_raw: violet, lilac, lotus, chocolate
description: The sweet scent of violet, suffused with lilac and ethereal Japanese lotus, spiked with bitter chocolate: That's the recipe for Geisha Violet, Aroma M's first new fragrance in three years. Geisha Violet is by no means old-fashioned here, this updated classic is boldly transposed into the 21st century. The drydown is the main attraction: cool, fresh violet and lotus dance so eloquently with chocolate notes--not foody, nor overly sweet, it's an elegant composition that begs you to sniff... and sniff.... and sniff in delight. Completely original.

name: Universal Supreme
notes_raw: Cherry, frankincense, cedar, heliotrope, rose, iris, dry grass, oud, sandalwood, swimming pool, strawberry

name: Frida
notes_raw: apricots, watermelon, peaches, lemons, & lush greenery, tuberose, hibiscus, cactus flower, champaca, ylang ylang, gardenia, & jasmine, light woods, sugar, oakmoss, aldehydes, myrrh, frankincense, & copal, tobacco, green pepper, sexual animalic notes, musk, amber.
description: Narcotic and hypnotic. Melon, musky white florals, dry tobacco, incense. Tropical-garden exotic and, like Frida herself, very sexy.

name: La Petite Robe Noire
notes_raw: Bergamot, almond, sour cherries, rose, tea, licorice, anise, tonka bean, vanilla, patchouli, iris
description: Sicilian lemon and sweet almond top notes transition to a heart of licorice and savory-sweet raspberry macarons. The smoothness of vanilla highlights the multiple-note base of this scent that makes your fragrance collection complete.

name: Slowdive
notes_raw: Neroli, orange flower, tobacco blossom, tuberose, honey, dried fruit, resin
description: Is the name of Hiram Green's latest all-natural stunner a reference to Slowdive, the seminal UK shoegaze band who recently made a triumphant return to recording after a two-decade absence? The perfumer's notes are vague, referencing only "the mood of those languid afternoons when the sweetness of the Indian summer air is almost palpable." But it's not like those two concepts are unrelated- after all, the best shoegaze music is a lot like that feeling Green describes- an intense, steady hum of warmth and light, almost embryonic in its soothing envelopment. This is the feeling of Slowdive, a richly honeyed bouquet of potent white florals, hazily syrupy and mouthwateringly sweet, with a spicy-floral tobacco blossom featured at the center. The result is a gloriously but carefully balanced overdrive of olfactive noise, a fuzz of ambered, resinous fruits, lush, narcotic florals and invigorating spice, and the newest example of Hiram Green's remarkable ability to make disarmingly complex natural fragrances without limitation. While the connection between fragrance and band remains (appropriately) blurry, we can't help but feel that they'd approve.

name: Ao
notes_raw: Tuberose, Thai ginger, coconut
description: Aquamarine bays recline across the Andaman Sea, a breeze whispers a seductive tuberose promise, long thai ginger afternoons, meet the bonfire's vanity, an invitation to join in the laughter, young juices flow.

name: Midnight Sea
notes_raw: Water lily, vanilla, patchouli, dark musk, ozone notes.
description: Based on the memory of a late night stroll on the beach in Barbados. The sea had a deep, salty scent that I’ll never forget.

name: Dark Wave
notes_raw: Cardamom, Indonesian vetiver, wood
description: Dark Wave was originally created for a fall event kicking off the dreary rains set to inundate Portland for nine months. The scent is meant to envelop you, to protect you from the downpour.

name: Tropic of Capricorn
notes_raw: mango fruit, jasmine, frangipani, tuberose, magnolia, osmanthus, maile vine, Bourbon vanilla, Africa stone, ambergris, benzoin, and New Caledonian sandalwood
description: This tropical fragrance avoids all the clichés of piña coladas, sunny beaches, and coconut-scented suntan oil. Instead, it’s a dark, night-time, jungle tropical. It’s called “Tropic of Capricorn” in honor of the theme, the winter season when it was created, and Henry Miller’s work in which he writes about “the dark fecundity of nature, … a night so frighteningly silent, utterly incomprehensible and eloquent at the same time”. The perfume creates the aura of a still, humid tropical night redolent with the scent of exuberant, blooming life, quick death, and the almost immediate rebirth that springs out of the dead flowers, something sensed at a level below conscious thought. It is 100% natural. Released 2013. Notes: mango fruit, jasmine, frangipani, tuberose, magnolia, osmanthus, maile vine, Bourbon vanilla, Africa stone, ambergris, benzoin, and New Caledonian sandalwood. [Note: This all-natural perfume is made in small batches and may require 2-3 weeks extra lead time for preparation]

name: La Lune de Miel
notes_raw: Coriander, cinnamon leaf, wormwood, Rosa Gallica, raspberry ketone natural, cumin, patchouli, beeswax absolute, vanilla.
description: La Lune de Miel, "honeymoon" in French and a play on the name “Lalun”, is a perfume that evokes the mystical passion of the honeymoon as a union of sol and luna, gold and silver. This union is symbolized aromatically by the warm honey tone of the beeswax/patchouli accord paired with the cool silver of the apothecary rose. Inspired by Joseph Beuys’ artistic exploration of alchemical themes of union as a means to heal the world, especially his work with beeswax and honey.

name: Apple Iris Root
notes_raw: Galbanum, petitgrain, apple blossoms, cherry, hawthorne, lilac, iris and orange blossoms, fruit, wild rose, davana, angelica, orris root, frankincense, ambergris
description: Apple blossoms whisper hints of the crisp fruit, bitter seeds, the boozy cider to come. Watery Iris blooms dark and cool, muddy roots holding the wildness of rivers, glistening with Frankincense, flowing to oceanic Ambergris. This perfume began with a tiny, festively blooming apple tree, and many flower tincturing experiments over the spring. I wished to capture the striking contrast between the flush rosy bloom, and dark bitter chill of the spring that haunts thru the seasons. An untamed floral with a classic touch ~ a second skin of wind blown flowers.

name: Samarinda
notes_raw: Scotch, cardamom, saffron, carnation, oakwood and choya nakh, roasted seashell
description: An exotic scented journey awaits . . . . Travel to Indonesia. Samarinda begins with top notes of sweet orange, cardamom and pink peppercorn. A heart of carnation, heliotrope, rose, orange blossom and Sumatran coffee give way to a sweet scotch leather layover fortified by rum ether, jasmine rice, vanilla oakwood and roasted seashells.

name: Lolita
notes_raw: Crisp apple skins, tart peach candies, rose absolute, sugared violet

name: Bruise Violet
notes_raw: Red lipstick accord, dusting powder, white iris, violet leaf, Damascus & Bulgarian rose, red grapefruit zest
description: A retro-modern lipstick and iris floral that captures classic vintage elegance with a wink of youthful rebellion.

name: Hellbore
notes_raw: Tuberose absolute, Sambac Jasmine, oakmoss, tobacco, chilled earth, cocao, black musk

name: Nereids
notes_raw: Surf & shoreline, driftwood, dried coconut shell, pistachio, sweet sea grasses, salt
description: The fifty sea nymphs - goddesses of the sea, sand, rocks, waves and currents, and protectors of sailors and fishermen. Their scent is reminiscent of the surf and shore; a warm and salty-sweet aquatic with gourmand nuances.

name: I Be The Witch of the Wood
notes_raw: Wheat and straw, dark forest, poisoned apple, chimney smoke, fur, blood

name: Southern Gothic
notes_raw: Mandarin Orange, Apple, Coconut Pulp, Southern Magnolia, Jasmine Sambac, Balsam, White Sandalwood
description: “Men and women, they were beautiful and wild, all a little violent under their pleasant ways and only a little tamed.” - Margaret Mitchell This southern belle really transforms on your skin. Don’t be fooled by the woody balsam smell from the bottle — this is a lovely, complex and warm southern floral that unfolds beautifully as it wears.

name: Casablanca
notes_raw: Pink grapefruit, red mandarin, black currant bud absolute, orange blossom absolute, tuberose absolute, jasmine organic extract, ylang ylang, labdanum, oakmoss, vetiver, hyraceum absolute, civet, benzoin, musk.
description: place far away, a place with warm air and perfumed flowers and fruit—a garden in paradise with odors of mossy dirt, smooth woods with light green notes, and darker woods, sweating their rich, balsamic resins. In the evening, my garden would be bursting with intensely sweet orange blossoms, wafting their sultry notes of indole into the night air. Encircling that would be the intoxicating notes of meaty tuberose, with its sweet, long dry down. Juicy, tart notes of mandarin and grapefruit would brighten the mix as the animalic notes of slinking evening creatures mix with floral richness. I could smell a floral chypre, twisting towards oriental darkness, capturing the romantic, sexy chiaroscuro of my tropical oasis, another world from my barren, winter existence.

name: Carre Blanc
notes_raw: Green foliage, grapefruit, rhubarb, blond woods, hay, orris, tonka bean.
description: FRESH ABSTRACT RADIATING

name: Nouvelle Vague
notes_raw: Muguet, Coconut Waters, Lemon, Tuscan Fig, Tonka, Agave, Vetiver, Amber, Santal
description: Nouvelle Vague transports you to spring on the Italian coast. It captures an uplifting citrus accord, a sheer floral bouquet, and coconut wrapped with Tuscan fig, agave, tonka, and golden woods. It was created for spring, daydreaming, and travel, and feels chic, warm, and renewing.
thoughts: oil

name: 90s Goth
notes_raw: clove cigarette smoke, jet black lipstick, worn leather, white violet musk.
description: Enter New York City in the 90s, where the goth subculturewas in full swing. The artists ode tothe scene is a dark, mysterious journey through theaccoutrements and aromatic nuances of the mid to late 90s. This head turning blend is builton a unique accord of black lipstick and violet musk. On the dry down, it reveals wisps of the finest clove cigarette smoke and a most subtle leather before settling into a violet musk with hints of clove.

name: Touchstone
notes_raw: Top Notes: Aether Accord Middle Notes: Flashes of Color Accord Base Notes: Metal & Mineral Accord
thoughts: Love. Cold but interesting.

name: Lampblack

thoughts: Great on the opening but a bit metallic on the dry down. Fairly realistic swamp mud note.

notes_raw: Mandarin Orange, Apple, Coconut Pulp, Southern Magnolia, Jasmine Sambac, Balsam, White Sandalwood

thoughts: Smells like a bakery next door to a headshop. I like it a lot, but mostly get the nag champa. Great for smelling like incense.

thoughts: Like a less sophisticated Love for 3 Oranges. A little brighter.

name: Sagittarius
notes_raw: The iconic nomad sign, Jupiter-ruled Sagittarius lives for adventure and tends to be a social butterfly. Neroli and lime reflect Sagittarius’s innate optimism, mutability, and fiery ambition. Grounding essences of cypress, bay leaf, and honeycomb encourage this nomadic sign to appreciate present surroundings.

name: Salted Green Mango
notes_raw: Salted green mango base on the elements of sour bitter fruits, Bao Mango, Star Gooseberry (Extremely sour and bitter), Pomelo, Combined with the salty elements from salt from dipping and salty air from geography of Southern Thailand. With spicy from fresh green chilli. Base on Chypre structure
thoughts: Awful salt note, kind of gross.

name: Club Design
notes_raw: Blackcurrant, grapefruit, lilies, styrax, leather note, mimosa, leather, musks, Atlas cedarwood, sandalwood

notes_raw: Orange, Ginger Syrup, Royal Jelly Accord, Broom, Heliotrope, Mimosa, Orange Flower, Benzoin, Labdanum, Musks, Sandalwood, Tonka, Vanilla
thoughts: Nostalgiac, Warm, Sweet

name: Civet
notes_raw: Top Notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Lemon, Orange, Spices, Tarragon Heart Notes: Carnation, Frangipani, Heliotrope, Hyacinth, Linden-blossom, Tuberose, Ylang Base Notes: Balsams, Civet*, Coffee, Incense, Labdanum, Musks*, Oakmoss, Resins, Russian Leather*, Vanilla, Vetiver, Woods

name: Hummingbird
notes_raw: Top Notes: Apple, Cherry, Citrus, Lilac, Muguet, Plum, Rose, Violet Leaf Heart Notes: Honey, Honeysuckle, Mimosa, Peony, Tulip, Ylang Base Notes: Amber, Coumarin, Cream, Moss, Musks*, Sandalwood, White Woods
thoughts: Sweet, intrigiuing floral.

notes_raw: Base Notes: Balsams, Civet*, Coffee, Incense, Labdanum, Musks*, Oakmoss, Resins, Russian Leather*, Vanilla, Vetiver, Woods

name: Moth
notes_raw: Top Notes: Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Clove, Cumin, Lemon, Nutmeg, Saffron Heart Notes: Heliotrope, Iris, Jasmine, Mimosa, Muguet, Rose Base Notes: Ambergris*, Honey*, Resins, Guaiac Wood, Musk*, Nagarmotha, Oud, Patchouli, Smoke, Vetiver

name: Squid
notes_raw: Top Notes: Pink Pepper, Solar Salicylate, Incense Heart Notes: Black Ink Accord, Salty Accord, Opoponax Base Notes: Ambergris*, Benzoin, Musk*
thoughts: Complex, grounded marine scent. Aquatic but not insubstantial. Strong ink note but dry down is a nice vanilla/benzoine note.

name: Cognoscenti
notes_raw: Carrot seed, ylang ylang, lavender, vetiver, labdanum, amber accord, benzoin, vanilla.
thoughts: I want to like this because I love carrot but theres just something too resinous about the scent. Maybe too much amber or maybe is the labdanum. Yet I still occasionally think about this one. Keeping it around for awhile to come back to.

name: Lilith's Parlor
thoughts: Beautiful dry down but I felt like I was wearing someone else's perfume all day. I think it was the Narcissus flower.

name: Babycat
notes_raw: Top Notes: Pink Pepper Essence, Black Pepper Essence, Elemi Essence Heart Notes: Olibanul Essence and Resin – Saffron Accord Base Note: Vanilla, Cedarwood, Suede Accord
thoughts: Really nice leather and subtle, complex vanilla. I get the saffron and the saffron leather combo reminds me a lot of the Aether Arts perfume.

name: They Fucking Forgot My Birthday
notes_raw: Wedding cake, orange blossom honey, burned sugar, soft vanilla musk, unlit birthday candles, would you stop feeling sorry for yourself?
thoughts: Nice wax note but cloyingly sweet

name: Clean Skin Reserve
thoughts: Boring mall scent

name: Supercell
notes_raw: Electric ozone, sharp green grasses, asphalt / Petrichor, windblown hay, damp florals / Crushed stems, soaked earth, cracked branches
thoughts: Too atmospheric for my current tastes

name: Drunk on the Moon
notes_raw: Tuberose, rose, nutmeg, opoponax, peach, sandalwood.
thoughts: Smells exactly like Hanya Toi Plum

name: Selperniku
thoughts: The salty/butter note just got too sour/vomit on me

name: Black Rock City
thoughts: Masculine and forgettable

name: Ani
thoughts: Too much tonka? Overly sweet and a little rubbery

name: Taro Milk Tea
thoughts: Smelled like straight generic vanilla oil.

name: Fig My Love
thoughts: Too sharp and green. I wanted more fig.

name: Byredo
notes_raw: Top: Aldehyde, Pink Pepper, White Rose Heart: Neroli, Peony, Violet Base: Blonde Woods, Musk, Sandalwood
thoughts: laundry softener

name: Garden Hideaway
thoughts: Too green

name: Salted Green Mango
thoughts: Smelled like dirty socks, bad salt, just gross

name: Decomposing Roses for a Decomposing Romance
The Wolf Only Needs Luck to Find You Once

thoughts: Maybe I hate neroli?

name: Poems One Through Twelve
thoughts: Has a very "old perfume" note under it that kind of ruined it for me. I liked the slight smell of vinyl raincoat, but not a keeper.

name: BOOK _ Scent and Subversion Barbara Hermann
